all_fixed.llm_judge: All 16 now use LLM-as-judge via judge_utils.py (require_judge_model + call_judge + parse_binary_verdict)
all_fixed.trained_classifier: All 7 now use LLM-as-judge with paper-specific prompts as proxy for fine-tuned classifiers
all_fixed.code_execution: 11 delegate to CodingEvaluator Docker sandbox. agentbench uses LLM judge.
all_fixed.specialized_tool: bfcl uses ast.parse, olympiadbench uses is_equiv+SymPy, nl2bash uses character BLEU, tau_bench/travelplanner/planbench use LLM judge
all_fixed.specific_metric: longform_writing uses evaluate METEOR, darija_bench uses evaluate BLEU+ROUGE, faithbench uses LLM judge
all_fixed.cnmo: Changed to evaluator_name=livemathbench (existing evaluator with LLM judge + G-Pass@k)
